item.name: Wind-up Dezul Qualan
item.description:
It is said Ixali engineer Dezul Qualan began crafting war dirigibles after having a vision of ninety-nine red balloons floating over the Black Shroud.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Dezul Qualan minion.
item.tooltip:
Soar once again, we shall.
Within <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>,
our salvation lies!
  - Sezul Totoloc
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers 5% damage to the nearest enemy Arcana Stone.
